channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: A look inside the Tampa Bay Rays' 120-hour makeover of the Yankees' Steinbrenner Field
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Junior Caminero opened the narrow white door in his new spacious locker and the Tampa Bay third baseman discovered a bat Giancarlo Stanton left behind. Down the row at the other prestigious corner stall, pitcher Shane Baz had no idea he was in Aaron Judge's spring training abode.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deion Sanders' contract at Colorado extended through the 2029 season
item.description: Colorado coach Deion Sanders has received a contract extension through the 2029 season after turning around a downtrodden program in just two seasons.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Grizzlies fire head coach Taylor Jenkins in shocking move as Memphis holds fifth seed in conference
item.description: The Memphis Grizzlies announced that they had fired head coach Taylor Jenkins, in a statement on Friday, despite his being the fifth seed in the Western Conference.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democratic lawmaker in Washington likens trans sports bans to racial segregation
item.description: A Democratic lawmaker in Washington likened legislation barring trans athletes from girls' and women's sports to racial segregation during a House Education Committee session on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Memphis Grizzlies fire Taylor Jenkins, franchise's winningest coach
item.description: The Memphis Grizzlies have fired coach Taylor Jenkins with the team struggling down the stretch and at risk of losing home-court advantage for the postseason.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: RSL seeks redemption in Minnesota after home setback
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4) — Real Salt Lake looks to bounce back from a rare home loss as they go on the road to face Minnesota United FC on Saturday night. Real Salt Lake’s attack will be bolstered by the return of Polish attacking winger Dominic Marzcuk and U.S.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Why the most popular accessory at SF’s Sweet 16 was being given out for free
item.description: One man's dream, a car accident and licensing troubles led to David Sierra, the creator of "Chomp Gloves," sparking joy in many fans outside the NCAA regional semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Spanish court overturns soccer player Dani Alves' rape conviction on appeal
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Brazilian soccer player Dani Alves won his appeal against a sexual assault conviction as a Spanish court overturned the ruling Friday in a case that lasted more than three years and saw the former Barcelona defender spend 14 months in jail.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gronk-a-Mania set to run wild over WrestleMania weekend
item.description: Rob Gronkowski grew up emulating his sports heroes in school, never shy about unleashing a Stone Cold Stunner or dropping a People’s Elbow on his roughhousing friends.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: March Maddening? Timing of transfer portal opening can be tough on coaches still in the tourney
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Coaches still playing in the NCAA Tournament are having to split their time between preparing their teams for the Sweet 16 and talking to potential transfers who have entered the portal. Such is life in college basketball.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AP mock NFL draft 2.0: Titans take Cam Ward first and Giants take Shedeur Sanders at No. 3
item.description: Cam Ward believes he solidified his shot to become the No. 1 pick in the NFL draft. The Tennessee Titans have the first crack to make the Heisman Trophy finalist from Miami their franchise quarterback.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Freddie Freeman’s wife shares positive update nearly a year after son’s rare diagnosis
item.description: Freddie Freeman's 2025 season is off to a bright start after his wife revealed that their son Max, 4, has been recovering well since being diagnosed with a rare neurological condition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Will Richard and top-seeded Florida run away from Maryland's 'Crab Five' for 87-71 March Madness win
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Florida's three standout seniors and its deep bench kept bringing energy until it became too tough for Maryland's “Crab Five” to keep up. Coach Todd Golden could see his Gators wearing the Terrapins down.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alabama makes March Madness record 25 3s and romps past BYU 113-88 to reach Elite Eight
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Alabama broke the 35-year-old March Madness record for 3-pointers with 25 and Mark Sears scored 30 of his 34 points on 3s, a relentless long-range spree that ushered the second-seeded Crimson Tide past BYU 113-88 on Thursday night in an NCAA Tournament East Region semifinal.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose for 14th time in last 15 games, 121-110
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Alperen Sengun had 33 points and 10 rebounds, Amen Thompson finished with 16 points, 10 rebounds and five assists, and the Houston Rockets beat the Utah Jazz 121-110 on Thursday night. The Jazz have now lost 14 of its last 15 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers celebrate 2024 World Series victory with Ice Cube and Kirk Gibson at home opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It’s a new season but the Los Angeles Dodgers are still celebrating their 2024 World Series championship. Rapper Ice Cube rolled up to their dugout in a vintage blue convertible with the Commissioner’s Trophy in the front passenger seat.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler 2 back of a 4-way tie for the lead at Houston Open. Rory McIlroy 5 behind
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Scottie Scheffler and Rory McIlroy wanted a final tune-up before the Masters and spent parts of the Thursday at the Houston Open under an umbrella in wind and rain that prevented anyone from getting too far away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flyers fire head coach John Tortorella just before season’s end after questionable comments
item.description: The Philadelphia Flyers announced the decision to part ways with head coach John Tortorella Thursday, just days after he made questionable remarks about his interest in coaching.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Environmental activists to protest Dodgers' home opener over partnership with embattled oil company
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers will see a group of protesters kick off opening day on Thursday because of the team's partnership with an embattled oil company.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baseball fans lament MLB app technical issues on opening day
item.description: MLB fans took to social media to share their problems with the MLB app on opening day Thursday, preventing them from following and watching games live.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees catcher Austin Wells makes MLB history with lead-off opening-day home run
item.description: New York Yankees catcher Austin Wells made MLB history with his leadoff opening-day home run against the Milwaukee Brewers on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Rail service to and from Petco Park expands for Padres season
item.description: The North County Transit District is expanding COASTER service to provide fans with a safe and convenient way to get to and from Petco Park on Padres game days.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Padres Opening Day: What's new inside Petco Park
item.description: The baseball season has finally returned and San Diego Padres fans are getting amped to set foot back inside Petco Park. Here's what is new for fans inside the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake shut out by FC Dallas, 1-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (AP) - Luciano Acosta scored the match's lone goal deep into first-half stoppage time to lift FC Dallas to a 1-0 win over Real Salt Lake on Saturday in a Western Conference match in Sandy, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: X-Finity drivers say what they're excited for in Saturday's race
item.description: This weekend, X-Finity and NASCAR Cup Series drivers head to South Florida after crossing the country from Las Vegas to Homestead.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU will have hands full with Wisconsin
item.description: DENVEER (ABC4 Sports) - If BYU is going to get to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, the Cougars are going to have to deal with one of the powers of the Big Ten Conference, #13 Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks to build momentum as FC Dallas comes to town
item.description: Real Salt Lake, having won on the road against the Houston Dynamo last weekend, will welcome FC Dallas to America First Field on Saturday night with a chance to start a winning streak in front of their home fans.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
